title: Debris ESP Finder Edition
description: Instantly spot hidden debris and valuable blocks with Debris ESP: Finder Edition!
body:
# Debris ESP – Finder Edition by Ownix

🔍 **Debris ESP – Finder Edition** is a Minecraft **texture pack** designed to make debris, ores, and other important blocks easier to spot, giving you a competitive edge without altering gameplay mechanics.

⚡ Highlights valuable blocks with clear, vibrant textures.  
🎯 Perfect for explorers, miners, and PvP players who want to locate resources faster.  
🎮 Lightweight and fully client-side, ensuring smooth performance on all systems.

## Features
- 💎 Highlights ores and debris for quick spotting  
- 👀 Enhanced visibility without changing game mechanics  
- ⚡ Optimized for smooth, lag-free gameplay  

---

**🎨 Design & Branding:**  
Designed by **Ownix Studio**
